# notifications-service

Sends transactional email and push notifications to customers.

## Areas
- `notify/email.py` — SMTP delivery, templating, retry queue.
- `notify/push.py` — mobile push via APNs/FCM.
- `notify/api.py` — Flask blueprint for enqueuing notifications.

## Keywords
notification, email, push, template, smtp, delivery, customer, retry
